title: Coordinate artificial insemination and fertility management of livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Coordinate artificial insemination and fertility management of livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare animals for artificial insemination

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to address risks and biosecurity hazards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to address risks and biosecurity hazards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to address risks and biosecurity hazards.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to task.

pcs.text: Assess average body condition of female livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess average body condition of female livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess average body condition of female livestock.

pcs.text: Provide advice on nutritional requirements to facilitate optimum condition at the time of artificial insemination as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide advice on nutritional requirements to facilitate optimum condition at the time of artificial insemination as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide advice on nutritional requirements to facilitate optimum condition at the time of artificial insemination as required.

pcs.text: Confirm females are not pregnant before commencing the artificial insemination program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm females are not pregnant before commencing the artificial insemination program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm females are not pregnant before commencing the artificial insemination program.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare animals for artificial insemination

elements.title: Facilitate artificial insemination

pcs.text: Carry out oestrus inducement and detection procedures according to animal welfare procedures and industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out oestrus inducement and detection procedures according to animal welfare procedures and industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out oestrus inducement and detection procedures according to animal welfare procedures and industry standards.

pcs.text: Prepare artificial insemination equipment and facilities, including artificial insemination tank and semen
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare artificial insemination equipment and facilities, including artificial insemination tank and semen?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare artificial insemination equipment and facilities, including artificial insemination tank and semen.

pcs.text: Use handling techniques that minimise stress and discomfort to livestock according to workplace health and safety and animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use handling techniques that minimise stress and discomfort to livestock according to workplace health and safety and animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use handling techniques that minimise stress and discomfort to livestock according to workplace health and safety and animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Apply hygiene procedures to minimise risk of infection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply hygiene procedures to minimise risk of infection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply hygiene procedures to minimise risk of infection.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Facilitate artificial insemination

elements.title: Carry out post artificial insemination procedures

pcs.text: Maintain female livestock on appropriate nutrition and husbandry management
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain female livestock on appropriate nutrition and husbandry management?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain female livestock on appropriate nutrition and husbandry management.

pcs.text: Monitor female livestock for signs of early abortion or return to oestrus
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor female livestock for signs of early abortion or return to oestrus?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor female livestock for signs of early abortion or return to oestrus.

pcs.text: Apply pregnancy detection techniques and identify pregnancy status of animals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply pregnancy detection techniques and identify pregnancy status of animals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply pregnancy detection techniques and identify pregnancy status of animals.

pcs.text: Complete required artificial insemination and pregnancy status records
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete required artificial insemination and pregnancy status records?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete required artificial insemination and pregnancy status records.
